title: Prepared food search relevance
summary: 제품·재료를 visibility scope 적용 뒤 하나의 typed union으로 정렬하고, 브랜드+제품명 coverage·정수 cursor·IME 요청 제어를 실제 287,041-row 품질/성능 gate와 함께 잠근다.
goal: 연세크림빵 같은 무공백 브랜드+제품명 검색이 private/moderation/current-nutrition 경계를 약화하지 않으면서 관련도 높은 제품과 재료를 한 page와 한 cursor로 안정적으로 반환하게 한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for authoring, repair, implementation, review, security, performance, or closeout
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, backend/data implementation, security/DB review, performance review, five-axis review, frontend implementation, Stage 5 review, and Stage 6 closeout; no session approves its own work

dependencies: account-session-generation-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1073
prepared-food-catalog, community-prepared-food-catalog, public-prepared-food-catalog-import, and prepared-food-standard-basis-ux merged

external_smokes: node scripts/verify-prepared-food-search-remote.mjs --mode post-merge-read-only from merged exact SHA only
deployed GET /api/v1/food-catalog/search unauthorized, public, community, and mine scope smoke
remote ranked RPC exact-principal positive and PUBLIC/anon negative ACL matrix
remote v1/v2 cursor, current-nutrition, moderation, owner-private, and legacy /food-products compatibility smoke
remote writes and runtime provider requests remain zero

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/prepared-food-search-relevance.test.ts tests/food-catalog-search-route.test.ts tests/food-catalog-search-security.test.ts tests/food-catalog-search-cursor.test.ts
pnpm exec vitest run tests/food-catalog-search-client.test.tsx tests/food-catalog-search-ime.test.tsx
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of all five Stage 1 core artifacts
separate Codex performance review of candidate cap, Recall/Precision, p95, and EXPLAIN evidence
separate Codex Stage 5 behavior/accessibility review and Stage 6 closeout

out_of_scope: Product-to-canonical-ingredient link and pantry effective ingredient owned by successor #2
Meal log writes, custom recipe product attach, and meal-log UI owned by successors #9 and #12
Initial-consonant search, automatic correction copy, external search engine, runtime provider search, or broad one-character typo matching
Client-side merge of ingredient and product pages
Unmerged migration application or production/staging data writes
notes: Approval remains not_started until a fresh, separate Codex internal 1.5 reviewer approves the five Stage 1 core artifacts. This slice is Release Train A and may ship independently after its own current-head gates. F0 runtime activation is not a dependency. Stage 1 verify_commands contain only the executable docs-validator, focused workflow Vitest, lint, typecheck, dependency-audit, and diff-check subset. Search-specific Vitest/PostgreSQL/performance/client/E2E/remote-verifier entries are planned Stage 2/4/closeout artifacts locked by this docs contract, not commands claimed executable in the Stage 1 PR; Stage 2 must add failing tests first and observe RED. The Stage 1 author must not approve, merge, or close its own work.
